connectorUiConfig.title: Tanium's Compliance Findings Push Connector
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown: This data feeds Sentinel workbooks and playbooks so analysts can enrich incidents, visualize endpoint risk and health, and automate investigation and response workflows. For more details about Tanium, head to [https://www.tanium.com/contact-us/](https://www.tanium.com/contact-us/)

dataTypes.name: TaniumComplyCompliance_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
TaniumComplyCompliance_CL
| summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
| where isnotempty(Time)

value:
TaniumComplyCompliance_CL
| summarize LastLogReceived = max(TimeGenerated)
| project IsConnected = LastLogReceived > ago(7d)

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: read and write permissions are required.

customs.name: Microsoft Entra
customs.description: Permission to create an app registration in Microsoft Entra ID.

customs.name: Microsoft Azure
customs.description: Permission to assign Monitoring Metrics Publisher role on data collection rule (DCR).

instructionSteps.title: 1. Create ARM Resources and Provide the Required Permissions
instructionSteps.description: This connector creates the necessary Log Analytics Tables, DCRs and applies the required permissions. This allows the data sent in to be read in to Microsoft Sentinel.

parameters.content:
#### Automated Configuration and Secure Data Ingestion with Entra Application 
Clicking on "Deploy" will trigger the creation of Log Analytics tables and a Data Collection Rule (DCR). 
It will then create an Entra application, link the DCR to it, and set the entered secret in the application. This setup enables data to be sent securely to the DCR using an Entra token.

instructionSteps.title: 2. Configure Tanium Connections
instructionSteps.description: Use the following parameters to configure the your Tanium Connections to push data to the workspace.

parameters.label: Entra App Registration Application ID
parameters.placeholder: Deploy push connector to get the App Registration Application ID (aka Client Id)

parameters.label: Entra App Registration Secret
parameters.placeholder: Deploy push connector to get the App Registration Secret (aka Client Secret)

parameters.label: Data Collection Endpoint Uri
parameters.placeholder: Deploy push connector to get the Data Collection Endpoint Uri

parameters.label: Data Collection Rule Immutable ID
parameters.placeholder: Deploy push connector to get the Data Collection Rule Immutable ID

parameters.content:
#### Configure Tanium Connections
Update your Tanium Connections' configuration with the above credentials to enable pushing to Microsoft Sentinel.
